text: The first scene feels quiet, almost meditative—the soft beanbags and subdued lighting make me feel contemplative and at ease. There’s a sense of waiting, as if the room expects creation or discussion. The second scene, full of vibrant colors and stimulating text about research and development, stirs my curiosity. I feel intellectually awake, eager to engage with new ideas about humanity and technology. The juxtaposition of stillness and stimulation between these worlds makes me reflect on the spaces that shape our minds.
